title: Index
description: Membuat dan mengelola index untuk optimasi query di MySQL.

commands.name: CREATE INDEX
commands.title: Membuat Index
commands.description: Membuat index pada kolom untuk mempercepat query.
commands.syntax: CREATE [UNIQUE|FULLTEXT|SPATIAL] INDEX nama_index ON tabel (kolom1, kolom2, ...);
commands.notes: Index mempercepat SELECT tapi memperlambat INSERT/UPDATE. Jangan over-index.

commands.name: DROP INDEX
commands.title: Menghapus Index
commands.syntax:
DROP INDEX nama_index ON tabel;
ALTER TABLE tabel DROP INDEX nama_index;
commands.examples:
DROP INDEX idx_email ON users;
ALTER TABLE users DROP INDEX idx_email;

commands.name: SHOW INDEX
commands.title: Tampilkan Index
commands.examples:
SHOW INDEX FROM users;
SHOW INDEX FROM orders;

commands.name: EXPLAIN
commands.title: Explain Query Plan

options.description: Tipe akses (ALL, index, range, ref, const)

commands.notes: type dari terbaik ke terburuk: system > const > eq_ref > ref > range > index > ALL.

commands.name: FULLTEXT SEARCH
commands.title: Full-Text Search
commands.notes: Fulltext search jauh lebih efisien daripada LIKE '%kata%' untuk pencarian teks.
